lair_analysis.door_action: cutToBlack + setTimeout(resolve,700) — correct fade before game start
lair_analysis.map_action: cutToBlack + resolve — biome select future, starts game now
lair_analysis.crystal_bookshelf: tooltip only — no resolve, stays in lair loop
lair_analysis.dispose_called: dispose() removes resize+mousemove+click listeners, traverses scene, disposes geometries+materials, removes canvas from DOM
lair_analysis.animation_loop: rAF tick in runMerlinLair(), cancelled via cancelAnimationFrame after zone resolves

candle_analysis.lifetime_reset: particle reset to cx/cy+0.55/cz on death — no accumulation drift

sfx_analysis.context_resumption: AudioContext.resume() on first click/keydown — browser autoplay compliant
sfx_analysis.silent_fail: try/catch in handleSFX — audio failure never crashes game

cotes_batch2.thematic_coherence: HIGH — phoque regard, barque sans pilote, pecheur rituel, ossements falaise, sirene filet, grotte spirales, tempete silhouette, chateau sable, lanterne flottante, pieuvres port, phare Morse, baleine echouee, femme marche eau, source votive, korrigans galets, bateau An Anaon, trois soeurs filet, cerf marin, brume voix, galets oghams
cotes_batch2.note: niamh 28% and ankou 15% slightly under targets (35%/20%) — thematic coherence maintained, no constraint violations
